fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item attribute.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the attribute cannot be assigned to an item. Items to which the attribute is already assigned are not affected.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the item attribute.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item or resource's unit of measure, such as piece or hour.
